entity.summary: Brazilian centralized cryptocurrency exchange that operated from 2017 until an orderly shutdown in 2021. Braziliex announced on 2021-05-24 that it would end operations after approximately four years, citing the risks of operating in the market, stronger competition, and regulatory uncertainty in Brazil. The published wind-down schedule set 2021-06-18 as the withdrawal deadline and 2021-06-25 as the final closure date.
entity.notes: Launch date is normalized to 2017-01-01 because contemporary closure reporting establishes operation from early 2017 but not an exact launch day. death_reason is voluntary_shutdown because the operator announced an orderly business closure; regulatory uncertainty and competition were stated contributing factors.

events.title: Braziliex began operating in Brazil
events.description: Contemporary closure reporting states that Braziliex had operated in Brazil since early 2017 and had completed approximately four years in the market by May 2021.
events.notes: Year-level date normalized to the first day of 2017 because an exact launch date was not established.

events.title: Braziliex announced the end of operations
events.description: Braziliex announced that it would close after four years, publishing a wind-down calendar for trading, APIs, deposits, and customer withdrawals. The operator cited operating risk, new competitors, and regulatory uncertainty in Brazil.
events.notes: Multiple contemporaneous Brazilian financial and crypto publications reproduced the operator's closure statement and schedule.

events.title: Braziliex reached its final closure date
events.description: Braziliex's published closure calendar set 2021-06-25 as the date on which the exchange would leave the market permanently, following the customer withdrawal deadline.
events.notes: Used as the terminal operational marker.

evidence.title: Braziliex encerra atividades após quatro anos
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report confirming approximately four years of operation and the closure schedule.

evidence.title: Braziliex extends final withdrawal date during closure
evidence.notes: States that Braziliex had operated in Brazil since early 2017.

evidence.title: Braziliex announces closure and withdrawal schedule
evidence.notes: Major Brazilian financial publication reporting the operator's announcement and staged closure.

evidence.title: Braziliex announces final customer withdrawal date
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report reproducing the closure rationale and customer schedule.

evidence.title: Braziliex ends activities amid regulatory uncertainty and competition
evidence.notes: Includes an image of the closure communication and the stated business and regulatory reasons.

evidence.title: Braziliex closure schedule and permanent market exit
evidence.notes: Confirms the final closure date of 2021-06-25.

evidence.title: Braziliex permanent closure date
evidence.notes: Reports that the exchange would leave the market permanently on 2021-06-25.

evidence.title: Braziliex shutdown timeline
evidence.notes: Reproduces the staged closure calendar and 2021-06-25 final date.
